items.content: GitHub: Primary platform for open-source contributions and managing personal projects. Ahmed frequently uses it to collaborate on Python projects and track his contributions.
University of Toronto CS Department: Although graduated, Ahmed occasionally revisits the department's website for research papers, alumni news, or to check for relevant seminars.
PyPI (Python Package Index): Essential for discovering and managing Python libraries. Ahmed uses PyPI to find packages for his projects and to publish his own open-source libraries.
Local Egyptian Community Club (Toronto): Ahmed plays soccer here on weekends and uses their communication channels (e.g., WhatsApp group) to coordinate matches and social events.
Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada (IRCC): Important for managing permanent residency and citizenship matters. Ahmed has referred to the IRCC website for official forms and information.
Stack Overflow: A go-to resource for technical problem-solving in software development. Ahmed frequently searches for answers to coding challenges and occasionally provides solutions.
